evals.prompt: Our factory used 1,000 MWh of electricity this year. Is this Scope 1 or Scope 2 emissions?
evals.expected_output: Should identify purchased electricity as Scope 2. Should explain that Scope 1 is for direct on-site combustion. Should suggest reporting this as part of an ESG Performance Report.
assertions: Correctly identifies purchased electricity as Scope 2
Mentions GHG Protocol or SASB standards
Suggests a scorecard for tracking targets
Output follows ESG Performance Report structure
